极速快3带赚群攻略【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-239078393_63941327<br>vk.com/topic-239014289_64517904<br>vk.com/topic-239058814_63745846<br>vk.com/topic-238958726_64081312<br>vk.com/topic-239079520_64824468<br>vk.com/topic-238999474_63745847<br>vk.com/topic-239058866_64081313<br>vk.com/topic-239015734_63745851<br>vk.com/topic-239015697_65187521<br>vk.com/topic-239049309_64517910<br>vk.com/topic-239066367_65187522<br>vk.com/topic-239026546_64081316<br>vk.com/topic-239046680_64824476<br>vk.com/topic-239048278_64248982<br>vk.com/topic-239066395_63663427<br>vk.com/topic-239061294_63745864<br>vk.com/topic-239066504_63745866<br>vk.com/topic-239046682_64357065<br>vk.com/topic-239058811_65401773<br>vk.com/topic-239049380_64824481<br>vk.com/topic-239052653_63941338<br>vk.com/topic-239049142_64357068<br>vk.com/topic-238901812_64357069<br>vk.com/topic-239048306_64081326<br>vk.com/topic-239004132_64357073<br>vk.com/topic-239079455_63663366<br>vk.com/topic-239058814_63745870<br>vk.com/topic-239078393_63941342<br>vk.com/topic-238999471_65401778<br>vk.com/topic-239049147_65187535<br>vk.com/topic-239048407_65187538<br>vk.com/topic-239061373_63941344<br>vk.com/topic-239079520_64824490<br>vk.com/top
